entity.description: Snorer, a Berothite, one of David’s heroes, and armour-bearer of Joab (1 Chr. 11:39).

verses.text: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Beerothite, armourbearer to Joab the son of Zeruiah,
Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,
